title: alternanthera helleri
intro: Alternanthera helleri, also known as Joseph's Coat, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Alternanthera helleri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic potential.
